title: Senior Revenue Manager at ITC Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at ITC Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels! We are hiring a Revenue Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
